metadata.description: Live interference metering for REAPER. Star a Reference track and every other tapped track shows where the Reference competes with it or out-levels it in its own territory, per frequency band. Pan-aware, time-aware (steady/intermittent/takes turns), with stereo-width/mono-compatibility and contribution views. Requires ReaImGui and the "Comparator spectrum tap" JSFX package from this repository. v0.x: experimental, expect breaking changes.

version.author: Danilo Trebjesanin
version.changelog: Initial experimental release. Work in progress: tested in one studio, Windows only so far; tap protocol changes between updates require Remove all + Tap all.

reapack.name: Comparator_Tap.jsfx
reapack.desc: Comparator spectrum tap (JSFX analyzer, required by Comparator)

metadata.description: The per-track analyzer for Comparator. Inserted and managed automatically by the Comparator script (Tap all / Tap selected); you normally never touch it directly, except the "Analyze channel pair" slider for multi-out instruments.
Comparator: a free, open-source masking/interference meter for REAPER, built entirely on native technology (JSFX taps, gmem, ReaImGui). Work in progress; feedback welcome at the GitHub repository.
